content.problemStatement:
Chef took an examination two times. In the first attempt, he scored XXX marks while in the second attempt he scored YYY marks. According to the rules of the examination, the best score out of the two attempts will be considered as the final score.

Determine the final score of the Chef.


Input Format

The first line contains a single integer TTT — the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
The first line of each test case contains two integers XXX and YYY — the marks scored by Chef in the first attempt and second attempt respectively.


Output Format
For each test case, output the final score of Chef in the examination.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1: The best score out of the two attempts is 606060.
Test Case 2: The best score out of the two attempts is 676767.
Test Case 3: The best score out of the two attempts is 505050.
